testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3], target = 4 Output: 7 Explanation: The possible combination ways are: (1, 1, 1, 1) (1, 1, 2) (1, 2, 1) (1, 3) (2, 1, 1) (2, 2) (3, 1) Note that different sequences are counted as different combinations.
